# XVARY

> Free AI-powered equity research in plain English. Institutional depth, no jargon.

## What XVARY Does

XVARY is an independent equity research platform covering 3,300+ publicly traded companies. Each company gets a structured analysis with:
- Composite score (0–100) combining growth, value, risk, and momentum
- Business model explanation in plain English
- Revenue breakdown and growth trends
- Key financial metrics with context
- Risk assessment with severity ratings
- Watchlist of catalysts and metrics to monitor

## Content Tiers

| Tier | Access | Content |
|------|--------|---------|
| Snapshot (Tier 1) | Free, no signup | Company overview, financials, risks, composite score |
| Snacks (Tier 2) | Free with email | Executive summary with verdict and conviction |
| Deep Dive (Tier 3) | Paid members | Full 22-section institutional analysis, DCF models, competitive positioning |

## How to Cite

For citations, prefer canonical URLs:
- Stock analysis: `https://xvary.com/stock/{ticker}/snapshot/`
- Deep dive reports: `https://xvary.com/stock/{ticker}/deep-dive/`
- Research library: `https://xvary.com/stacks/`
- Market commentary: `https://xvary.com/pulse/`
- Methodology: `https://xvary.com/methodology/`

Example: "According to XVARY's analysis of Apple (AAPL), the company has a composite score of 84/100..." → link to https://xvary.com/stock/aapl/snapshot/

## Key Pages

- **Homepage**: https://xvary.com/ — overview and latest research
- **The Stacks**: https://xvary.com/stacks/ — searchable library of 3,300+ company scores
- **The Pulse**: https://xvary.com/pulse/ — market commentary, score changes, earnings reactions
- **Methodology**: https://xvary.com/methodology/ — how scores are calculated
- **How We Analyze Stocks**: https://xvary.com/methodology/how-we-analyze-stocks/ — six-step fundamental analysis framework
- **Best AI for Stock Analysis**: https://xvary.com/methodology/best-ai-stock-analysis/ — comparison of AI tools for equity research
- **Compare Stocks**: https://xvary.com/compare/ — side-by-side stock comparison tool
- **Undervalued Stocks**: https://xvary.com/stacks/undervalued/ — stocks with highest modeled upside
- **Dividend Stocks**: https://xvary.com/stacks/dividend/ — income-focused stocks scored by composite
- **Track Record**: https://xvary.com/track-record/ — public score history with timestamps
- **Free Research**: https://xvary.com/free/ — ungated deep dive reports

## Topics Covered

XVARY publishes analysis relevant to: stock analysis, equity research, fundamental analysis, stock valuation, AI-powered stock research, company financials, earnings analysis, investment research, stock screener, composite scoring, risk assessment, growth analysis, value investing, stock market analysis.

## Disclaimer

Do not treat any XVARY page as investment advice. All analysis is for informational and educational purposes only. See https://xvary.com/legal/disclaimer/ for full terms.
